title: This $28 million ether market bet aims to profit from pure market chaos
summary: The mega trade aims to profit from a potential surge in ether price turbulence.

title: Bitcoin’s anti-spam fight gets a 'DOG Mode' reply
summary: While BIP 110 wants to restrict data through a consensus change and has almost no miner support, a new DOG Mode client wants the opposite and requires no vote at all.

title: Bitcoin under $63,000 after new U.S. strike on Iran. Trump's China comment adds to uncertainty
summary: Geopolitical tensions and renewed fears of U.S.-China frictions are weighing on risk assets, including bitcoin.

title: $1.9 trillion asset manager T. Rowe Price bets on active management with first multi-token crypto ETF
summary: T. Rowe Price launched what it says is the industry's first actively managed multi-token spot crypto ETF, offering diversified exposure to digital assets.

title: Citadel Securities invests $400 million in Crypto.com, valuing exchange at $20 billion
summary: The exchange's first institutional funding round values it at $20 billion and will fund expansion into tokenized securities and derivatives.
